backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with role-based access control (admin/user), user profile management, and category/product CRUD operations using mixin-based authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to their implementation files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for hooks like useStableActor, useStableActorQuery, and refactored query hooks.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, page, and utility in the frontend application.
frontend/docs/ii-alternative-origins-man: Manual QA checklist for verifying Internet Identity authentication works correctly on both kelanicosmetics.es and www.kelanicosmetics.es production domains, including troubleshooting steps.
frontend/docs/product-details-modal-hist: Manual QA checklist validating product details modal navigation behavior (back button, close button, ESC, overlay) across homepage, search results, and category pages.
frontend/index.css: Empty global CSS file for the frontend application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kelani Cosmetics frontend app, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/public/.well-known/ii-alternati: Internet Identity alternative origins configuration file listing the two accepted production domains (with and without www) for authentication.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all search engine crawlers full site access and pointing to the sitemap location.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing the homepage, contact, and privacy pages of kelanicosmetics.es with their change frequencies and priorities.
frontend/scripts/verify-well-known-ii-al: Documentation stub providing instructions to verify the .well-known/ii-alternative-origins file is correctly served by the frontend build.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with the route tree and renders the global ToastViewport alongside the RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Displays an access-denied screen for non-admin users, showing their Internet Identity principal with a copy button and a logout option.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminHeade: Fixed top navigation header for the admin panel that includes a sidebar toggle, brand logo, logout button, and a Web Worker-based session keep-alive mechanism.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Login screen for the admin panel that triggers Internet Identity authentication via a single sign-in button with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSideb: Responsive sidebar navigation for the admin panel with links to all major sections, a mobile overlay, and active-route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminVerif: Full-screen loading card displayed while admin permission verification is in progress, featuring a pulsing spinner and status text.
frontend/src/components/admin/categories: Mobile-friendly card list for displaying categories with inline edit, delete, and reorder (up/down) controls, including loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/admin/CopyIconBu: Icon button that copies a given string to the clipboard and briefly shows a checkmark confirmation after a successful copy.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardN: Clickable card component used on the admin dashboard to navigate to a given route, displaying an icon and title with hover animations.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/C: Dropdown select for filtering products by category, fetching categories via a query hook and mapping the selection to a numeric ID or null for 'all'.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/D: An alert dialog component for confirming product deletion that requires the user to enter a hardcoded password ('DeleteIsUnsafe') before the delete mutation is executed.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/P: A card-based layout component for displaying a list of products on mobile, with inline controls for toggling per-store stock, featured status, and edit/delete actions.
A pagination control component that renders page navigation buttons, a page size selector, and an item count summary for the products list.
A table-based layout component for displaying products in a desktop view, with inline checkboxes for per-store stock, a featured star toggle, and edit/delete action buttons per row.
A modal dialog for creating or editing a product, handling form state for all product fields and lazy-loading the product photo when in edit mode.
frontend/src/components/admin/sales/Dele: An alert dialog for confirming the permanent deletion of a sale item, triggering the delete mutation on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/admin/sales/Sale: An alert dialog for confirming the deactivation of a sale item, calling an external onConfirm callback when the user confirms.
Mobile card-based view for displaying sale items with toggle active, edit, and delete actions, including a deactivation confirmation dialog.
Filter UI component for sale items that provides a status dropdown to filter by all or active items.
Pagination control component for sale items supporting page navigation, page size selection, and ellipsis-based page number display.
Desktop table view for sale items showing pricing, discount, dates, and status with toggle active, edit, and delete actions.
A badge component that displays the computed status ('Activo', 'Próximo', or 'Expirado') of a sale item with corresponding color styling.
Modal dialog for creating or editing a sale item, with product search, sale price input, automatic discount calculation, and date range validation.
frontend/src/components/admin/store-deta: Action buttons component for the store details form providing Save and Restore buttons with loading and dirty-state awareness.
Form component for editing store details including basic info fields (name, address, email, phone, WhatsApp), social media links, and per-day store hours.
Renders a read-only preview of store details (name, address, phone, email, hours, coordinates) formatted as they would appear on the contact page.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: A reusable dropdown component that fetches categories from the backend via `useCategoryOptions` and renders them as selectable items.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Reusable loading spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and inline/full-page display modes, using a Lucide Loader2 icon with animation.
frontend/src/components/public/CookieCon: Displays a cookie consent banner with accept/decline buttons, hiding it on the privacy page or after the user has already made a choice.
frontend/src/components/public/home/Cate: Renders a single product category section with a responsive product grid, limiting displayed products by device type and providing a 'see all' link when there are more.
frontend/src/components/public/home/Home: Composes the homepage hero area by combining the `StoreBanner` and `SearchBar` components within a full-width layout.
Renders an infinite-scrolling list of category sections on the homepage, loading more categories as the user scrolls down.
frontend/src/components/public/home/sear: Dropdown component that displays search autocomplete results, loading state, errors, or an empty-state message based on current search status.
A search input component with autocomplete dropdown for the homepage that converts search results to ProductWithSale shape and opens a product details modal on selection.
A single autocomplete dropdown item displaying product name, category, and price (with sale styling) for the homepage search bar.
frontend/src/components/public/home/Stor: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, and store tagline text for the homepage.
frontend/src/components/public/product/C: A button component that copies provided text to the clipboard using the modern Clipboard API with a textarea fallback, showing a success toast and temporary check icon.
frontend/src/components/public/product/P: A dialog modal displaying full product details including lazily-fetched photos (with module-level cache), sale pricing, stock indicators, store selector, and share button.
A thin wrapper component that renders ProductDetailsModal, intended to be mounted at the PublicLayout level for consistent modal availability across public pages.
frontend/src/components/public/product/S: A button that shares a product URL via the Web Share API or falls back to copying it to the clipboard, with a temporary 'copied' confirmation state.
An expandable button component that lists available stores and opens a WhatsApp contact link for the selected store and product when clicked.
frontend/src/components/public/products/: An image component that lazily fetches product photos via IntersectionObserver, caches blob URLs in a module-level map, and shows a spinner while loading.
A clickable card component displaying a product's lazy-loaded image, name, price (with sale badge and strikethrough), and stock status indicators.
A responsive grid that renders a list of ProductCard components and opens the product details modal with the cached photo URL on card click.
Renders color-coded stock status badges for two stores with tooltips, supporting both desktop hover and mobile tap-to-toggle behavior with auto-dismiss.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicFoo: Public site footer showing store information (address, phone, hours) for each store in a two-column grid, plus navigation links and copyright.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicHea: Sticky public site header with a hamburger menu button, logo link, and a desktop-only contact navigation link.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicSid: Slide-in side navigation panel showing main links (Home, Contact, Privacy) and a scrollable list of public categories, closeable via overlay click or Escape key.
Empty test file for the SafeSelect component.
frontend/src/components/SafeSelect.tsx: A wrapper around the shadcn Select component that enforces non-empty string values using sentinel constants ('all', 'none', 'no-change'), and provides utility functions for initializing, converting, and validating select state.
frontend/src/components/seo/SeoHead.tsx: Imperatively manages document head meta tags (title, Open Graph, Twitter, canonical) via useEffect, injecting and cleaning up tags marked with a data attribute.
frontend/src/components/seo/seoPresets.t: Exports pre-defined SEO metadata objects for the home, contact, and privacy pages of the Kelani Cosmetics site.
Renders an individual toast notification with an icon, title, optional description, and a dismiss button; supports pause-on-hover and animated enter/exit transitions.
frontend/src/components/toast/ToastViewp: Renders the container for all active toasts by reading from the toast store and mapping each to a ToastCard component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExport.ts: Provides hooks for fetching export statistics (category/product counts) and triggering a full data export mutation via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminImport.ts: Provides an importData function that calls the backend batchImportData method and maps errors to typed API errors with Spanish messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUserManagemen: Provides hooks for listing managed users and mutations to promote or demote users to/from admin roles, with cache invalidation and toast feedback.
Hook that verifies if the current user is an admin by calling the backend, with a 30-day cache stored in the auth store to avoid redundant checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useBothStoreDetails.t: Hook that fetches details for both stores in a single backend call using the stable actor pattern, returning an ordered array of StoreDetails.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryOptions.ts: Hook that fetches all categories and maps them to value/label dropdown options, exposing loading state and an isEmpty flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryProductsIn: Hook that fetches paginated category products using infinite scrolling via React Query's useInfiniteQuery, accumulating pages of ProductWithSale items.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryProductsPa: Hook that fetches a single page of category products with featured-first ordering using the stable actor pattern, supporting dynamic page size and retry via refetch.
frontend/src/hooks/useHomepageAutocomple: Hook that debounces a search query (300ms) and fetches up to 10 homepage product search results from the backend when the query is at least 2 characters.
frontend/src/hooks/useHomepageCategories: Hook that fetches homepage categories with infinite scrolling, accumulating CategorizedProductWithSale pages and exposing total category count.
frontend/src/hooks/useInfiniteScroll.ts: Hook that triggers a load-more callback when the user scrolls near the bottom, using IntersectionObserver with a rAF-throttled scroll event fallback and a 1-second cooldown.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Hook and provider that manage Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Hook that attaches an IntersectionObserver to a ref element and returns a boolean indicating whether the element is currently intersecting the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaQuery.ts: Hook that reactively tracks a CSS media query match, with convenience exports for isMobile and isTouchDevice breakpoints.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductModalNaviga: Hook that manages product modal open/close state in sync with the browser history API, handling both UI-initiated closes and browser back-button navigation via popstate.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductPhotoBlobUr: React hook that converts a Uint8Array product photo into a memoized blob URL, revoking the previous URL on change or unmount to prevent memory leaks.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and type mappings for fetching paginated product lists, individual product details with sale info, and product photos from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductSearchForSa: Hook that debounces a search query and fetches matching products (with prices) from the backend for use in sale item creation/editing forms.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicCategories.t: Hook that fetches all categories for public pages using the stable actor pattern, only triggering the query when a side panel is open.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, creating, and updating categories, including bigint-to-number conversion between backend and UI types.
frontend/src/hooks/useRequireAdminNaviga: Hook that redirects authenticated non-admin users to the /admin login page and exposes access and verification state.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaleItemQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and utilities for fetching paginated sale items, converting backend types to UI types, and determining sale status based on BigInt timestamps.
frontend/src/hooks/useStableActor.ts: Hook that stabilizes the backend actor reference by only updating state once when the actor first becomes available, preventing unnecessary React Query re-runs.
frontend/src/hooks/useStableActorQuery.t: Generic React Query wrapper that gates query execution on stable actor availability, merges actor initialization into isLoading, and infers return types from the selector function.
frontend/src/hooks/useStoreDetailsQuerie: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and updating store details, with conversion utilities between backend (BigInt, JSON coordinates) and UI (number, lat/lng) representations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSyncAuthFromIntern: Syncs the Internet Identity principal into the Zustand auth store whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useToggleProductFeatu: Mutation hook that toggles a product's featured status, preserving the existing photo by fetching it before calling updateProduct.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and styles toast notification animations.
frontend/src/layouts/admin/DashboardLayo: Admin dashboard shell layout that composes the AdminHeader and AdminSidebar with a collapsible sidebar and renders child content in a constrained main area.
frontend/src/layouts/public/PublicLayout: Public-facing layout that wraps pages with a header, side panel, footer, product modal host, and cookie consent banner.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRoute.tsx: Protected admin route component that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication and admin role verification, showing appropriate loading or denial states.
Admin page for managing product categories with search, create/edit/delete dialogs, and reorder controls, switching between table and card views based on screen size.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardHomePa: Admin dashboard home page that renders a grid of navigation cards linking to major admin sections like products, categories, store details, and import/export.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ExportPage.tsx: Admin export page that fetches store data statistics and triggers a JSON file download of all categories and products with BigInt serialization support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ImportPage.tsx: Admin page for importing store data from a JSON file, handling drag-and-drop upload, validation, and displaying import results including category/product counts and errors.
frontend/src/pages/admin/OnSaleProductsP: Admin page for managing on-sale products with paginated listing, search/filter controls, and modals for creating, editing, and deleting sale items.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductsPage.ts: Admin page for browsing and managing products with debounced search, category filtering, pagination, and modals for upserting and deleting products.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StoreDetailsPag: Admin page for viewing and editing details for two stores via tabbed forms, with validation, change tracking, and mutation-based save functionality.
frontend/src/pages/admin/UserManagementP: Admin page for managing user roles, allowing admins to search users, promote principals to admin, and demote admins back to regular users.
frontend/src/pages/public/CategoryPage.t: Displays a paginated product grid for a specific category, fetching products via infinite scroll and showing the category name, with loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/public/ContactoPage.t: Renders store contact information (address, phone, social links, hours) with an optional embedded Google Map gated behind cookie consent.
frontend/src/pages/public/HomePage.tsx: Public home page that renders a hero section and infinite-scroll categories section, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/public/PrivacyPage.ts: Static privacy policy page with a brief simulated loading state and structured Spanish-language legal content sections.
frontend/src/pages/public/ProductPage.ts: Displays a single product's details (image, price, sale info, stock status, store selector) fetched by barcode, with photo loaded from the actor canister.
frontend/src/router.tsx: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree, grouping public pages under PublicLayout and admin pages under AdminRoute.
frontend/src/session-worker.js: Web Worker that posts a keep-alive message to the main thread every 60 seconds to prevent session timeouts.
frontend/src/stores/authStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence for authentication state, managing principal, admin status, and a 30-day admin recheck interval.
frontend/src/stores/productModalStore.ts: Zustand store managing the open/close state and data (product and photo blob URL) for a product detail modal.
frontend/src/stores/toastStore.ts: Zustand store for managing toast notifications with type-based default durations and convenience helper functions (toast.success, toast.error, etc.).
frontend/src/utils/adminDate.ts: Utility functions for converting between HTML date strings, JavaScript Dates, and ICP nanosecond BigInt timestamps, with display formatting and date range validation.
frontend/src/utils/ApiResponseHandler.te: Empty test file for ApiResponseHandler utilities.
frontend/src/utils/ApiResponseHandler.ts: Provides standardized API response handling with BigInt-aware JSON parsing, a custom ApiError class, and retry logic for failed requests.
frontend/src/utils/BigIntSerializer.test: Empty test file for BigIntSerializer utilities.
frontend/src/utils/BigIntSerializer.ts: Handles safe BigInt serialization and deserialization, including a custom JSON parser that converts timestamp fields to BigInt to preserve nanosecond precision.
frontend/src/utils/categoryNumeric.ts: Utility functions for safely converting between UI numbers and Candid bigint types for category fields, including a helper for reorder arrays.
frontend/src/utils/cookieUtils.ts: GDPR cookie consent utilities using localStorage to get, set, and check user consent preferences, dispatching a custom event on changes.
frontend/src/utils/googleMaps.ts: Parses a JSON coordinates string and generates a Google Maps directions URL from the resulting lat/lng values.
frontend/src/utils/imageWebp.ts: Provides utilities for validating image files (type and size) and converting them to WebP format using a canvas element, plus helpers for creating and revoking blob URLs.
frontend/src/utils/importValidation.test: Empty test file for importValidation utilities.
frontend/src/utils/importValidation.ts: Validates and converts imported JSON data into typed Category and Product arrays, including timestamp field validation with BigInt conversion and detailed Spanish error messages.
frontend/src/utils/NumericConverter.test: Empty test file for NumericConverter utilities.
frontend/src/utils/NumericConverter.ts: Provides safe numeric conversion and validation helpers for IVA values, profit margins, stock booleans, and Spanish-formatted price display.
frontend/src/utils/phoneFormat.ts: Provides functions to format phone numbers for Spanish display and to clean/normalize numbers for use in WhatsApp wa.me links.
frontend/src/utils/productImage.ts: Exports a default product image URL fallback and a helper to check whether a product has real photo data.
Wraps toast notifications (error, warning, success, info) with console logging of detailed error context for developer debugging.
frontend/src/utils/storeDetailsValidatio: Defines validation functions and types for store details form fields (email, phone, coordinates, hours) and returns a structured result with per-field Spanish error messages.
frontend/src/utils/storeHoursFormat.ts: Formats store hours data for display by mapping English day keys to Spanish labels and translating individual English day names to Spanish.
frontend/src/utils/throttle.ts: Implements a throttle higher-order function that limits how often a callback is invoked, scheduling a trailing call if invocations occur within the delay window.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities to read URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL bar.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappContact.ts: Builds WhatsApp message strings and URLs for product inquiries and opens them in a new tab using the wa.me API.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of a frontend refactor project that centralizes all GET query hooks under a stable actor pattern (useStableActor + useStableActorQuery) to prevent redundant API calls and re-renders, listing completed features, architectural notes, and known issues.
